title: Ethically Sourced Leather
description: A true to life way of obtaining leather without killing animals.. mushroom leather! Two mushroom blocks (brown or red) makes one leather.
body: An ethical way of getting leather! Two mushrooms blocks (brown or red) become one leather. This fealt balanced and fair, and it's also infinitely renewable. This is in a series of mods that removed the need to kill our minecraft animal friends (:
